name: Shrimp with Peas and Carrots
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Frozen English peas and carrots, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water to a boil; add shrimp, and cook 3 to 5 minutes or until shrimp turn pink. Drain well; rinse with cold water.
2. Peel and devein shrimp.
3. Break vermicelli into 3-inch pieces. Cook according to directions; drain.
4. Stir in shrimp, green onions, and next 6 ingredients; set aside.
5. Combine sour cream and next 6 ingredients. Pour over shrimp mixture; toss gently.
6. Cover and chill.
7. Transfer the dish to a lettuce-lined platter.
